A system update is available. Please upg: Sasisho la mfumo linapatikana. Tafadhali sasisha usakinishaji wako.
Changes will not take effect until next: Mabadiliko hayatafanya kazi hadi kuingia tena.
Choose between light and dark color sche: Chagua kati ya mpango wa rangi nyepesi au nyeusi
ChurchCRM translations are managed by th: Tafsiri za ChurchCRM zinasimamiwa na jamii kwenye POEditor. Unaweza kusaidia kwa:
Customize the look and feel of the appli: Badilisha muonekano na hisia ya programu
Database-only (.sql) or full archive (.t: Hifadhidata peke yake (.sql) au kumbukumbu kamili (.tar.gz)
Default number of rows shown in data tab: Idadi ya kawaida ya safu zinazoonyeshwa kwenye jedwali la data. Itafanya kazi ukurasa ujao unapopakiwa.
Failed to cancel enrollment. Please try: Imeshindwa kufuta usajili. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Failed to delete event. Please try again: Imeshindwa kufuta tukio. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Failed to disable two-factor authenticat: Imeshindwa kuzima uthibitishaji wa hatua mbili. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Failed to generate QR code. Please try a: Imeshindwa kutoa nambari ya QR. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Failed to load calendar data. Please try: Imeshindwa kupakia data ya kalenda. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Imeshindwa kupakia tukio. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Failed to load recovery codes. Please re: Imeshindwa kupakia nambari za uokoaji. Tafadhali onyesha upya ukurasa.
Imeshindwa kuhifadhi tukio. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Fixing incorrect or awkward translations: Kurekebisha tafsiri zisizo sahihi au ngumu katika lugha yako
If you notice garbled characters, HTML e: Ikiwa unaona herufi zilizopotoka, vipengele vya HTML vinavyoonekana kama maandishi, au tafsiri zinazovunja muundo wa ukurasa, tafadhali ripoti tatizo hilo kwenye GitHub ili liweze kurekebishwa kwa wote.
Include your API key in requests using t: Jumuisha ufunguo wako wa API katika maombi kwa kutumia kichwa cha x-api-key:
Invalid JSON value — setting was not sav: Thamani batili ya JSON — mipangilio haikuhifadhiwa. Tafadhali irekebisha na ujaribu tena.
Join the Translation Project on POEditor: Jiunge na Mradi wa Tafsiri kwenye POEditor
Manage additional preferences like email: Simamia mapendeleo ya ziada kama vitenganishi vya barua pepe na chaguo za kuonyesha
Manage your API key for external integra: Simamia ufunguo wako wa API kwa muunganiko wa nje
Override the system default locale: Badilisha lugha ya msingi ya mfumo
Percentage of strings translated for you: Asilimia ya maneno yaliyotafsiriwa kwa lugha yako ya sasa
Set Permission to True to allow this use: Weka Ruhusa kuwa Kweli ili kumruhusu mtumiaji huyu kubadilisha mipangilio wenyewe.
Set the accent color used for buttons, l: Weka rangi ya msisitizo inayotumiwa kwa vitufe, viungo, na vipengele hai
Suggesting better phrasing for existing: Kupendekeza maneno bora kwa tafsiri zilizopo
Translating missing strings to improve c: Kutafsiri maneno yanayokosekana ili kuboresha usimamizi
Use this key to authenticate API request: Tumia ufunguo huu kuthibitisha maombi ya API. Kuzalisha upya kutabatilisha ufunguo wa sasa.
Version %s is available. Please upgrade: Toleo %s linapatikana. Tafadhali sasisha usakinishaji wako.
Your current access levels (read-only): Viwango vyako vya ufikiaji vya sasa (kusoma tu)
